steps.title: Set up
steps.content: At $t = 0$ there are 272 people. The count decreases by 16 each minute, so the slope is $-16$. A linear model has the form: $$p(t) = -16t + 272$$

steps.title: Solve
steps.content: Verify: at $t = 1$, $p(1) = -16(1) + 272 = 256$, which is $272 - 16$ — exactly 16 people boarded in the first minute.
